title: Physiotherapy Program Learning Outcomes
content:
Physiotherapy Program Learning Outcomes

Program Learning Outcomes

1. Uses their own language well ( required for reading comprehension, expressing properly, writing correctly, speaking clearly and communicating well with patients and their relatives).

2. Prone to teamwork and be able to communicate with the others (he/she can communicate effectively with patients, patients relatives, worked with his/her colleague, PRM physicians, physical therapists, prosthetic orthotic technician, nurse, psychologist, and helper staff).

3. Applies the requirements of the science of physical therapy to meet the needs of society at the highest level.

4. Has the highest level of professional knowledge and uses them in the working environment.

5. Performs the physiotherapy practice in accordance with modern approaches.

6. Aware of responsibilities and uses them in the working environment.

7. Takes the necessary security measures for patients and health (care) professionals in physiotherapy units.

8. Uses physiotherapy units in accordance with the rules.

9. Appreciates the importance of physiotherapy units for education and training.

10. Appreciates participating the scientific studies in education.

11. Uses his/her foreign language knowledge to follow and use up- to- date informations.

12. Adopts to gain additional qualifications that support the individual developments.

13. Adopts the values of social, scientific and professional ethics.
